name: dazzletools
author: DazzleTools
notes: The DazzleTools utility collection. Currently embedded in the dazzlecmd repo but intended to migrate to its own GitHub repo (DazzleTools/dazzletools-kit). This manifest travels with the kit -- when extracted to its own repo, the only change in dazzlecmd is replacing projects/dazzletools/ with a git submodule. The registry pointer in kits/dazzletools.kit.json controls activation only.
